summary: Iteration 47 - Pricing Hub, Upcoming Hub, and Closure Badge Features COMPLETE. All features tested and working: (1) Flagship cards show 'REGISTRATION CLOSED' overlay with opacity-60 and grayscale effect when enrollment_open=false. (2) Upcoming cards show closure badge with custom text when enrollment_open=false, disabled enroll button shows closure_text. (3) Pricing Hub admin tab renders Excel-style table with all programs, tier pricing rows, and sessions pricing. (4) Upcoming Hub admin tab renders all programs with toggles for Upcoming/Flagship/Enrollment, closure text dropdown appears only when Enroll Open is OFF.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set SoulSync enrollment_open=false with closure_text='Seats Full' for testing closure overlay, then restored to enrollment_open=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified new admin tabs (Pricing Hub, Upcoming Hub) and closure overlay logic. Both Flagship and Upcoming cards now show closure overlay when enrollment_open=false (admin-controlled via Upcoming Hub tab). Pricing Hub allows editing all program/session prices in one Excel-style grid. Upcoming Hub manages card settings including enrollment toggle and closure text dropdown.

verified: Card with enrollment_open=false shows opacity-60 class
Closure overlay badge displays closure_text (e.g., 'SEATS FULL')
Card with enrollment_open=true has no opacity class
Early Bird badge visible (if offer enabled)
Card with enrollment_open=false shows opacity-75 class
Tab visible in sidebar as 'Pricing Hub' with DollarSign icon
Excel-style Programs table with columns: Program, Visible, AED, INR, USD, Offer AED, Offer INR, Offer USD, Offer Badge
Duration tier sub-rows (1 Month, 3 Month, Annual) with editable tier pricing
Sessions table below with AED/INR/USD pricing columns
Tab visible in sidebar as 'Upcoming Hub' with Calendar icon
Excel-style table with columns: Program, Upcoming, Flagship, Enroll Open, Closure Text, Start Date, End Date, Deadline, Timing, Timezone
Upcoming/Flagship/Enroll Open columns have toggle switches
Closure Text column shows dropdown ONLY when Enroll Open is OFF
Closure dropdown has 4 options: Registration Closed, Seats Full, Enrollment Closed, Sold Out
Placeholder '-' shown when Enroll Open is ON

code_review_notes.ProgramsSection.jsx: Lines 171-247: ProgramCard component correctly implements closure overlay when enrollment_open===false. Uses opacity-60 class, grayscale-[40%] on image, and displays closure_text in overlay.
code_review_notes.UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx: Lines 188-362: UpcomingCard component has closure overlay at lines 236-242. Uses opacity-75 class, grayscale-[30%] on image. Disabled enroll button at line 351-354 shows closure_text.
code_review_notes.PricingHubTab.jsx: New Excel-style pricing grid with Programs table (with tier sub-rows) and Sessions table. Save All button persists all changes.
code_review_notes.UpcomingHubTab.jsx: New Excel-style upcoming programs manager with all required columns. Closure text dropdown conditionally rendered at lines 94-99.
